records.ety: [OE. neveu, nevou, nevu, fr. F. neveu, OF. also, nevou, L. nepos; akin to AS. nefa, D. neef, G. neffe, OHG. nevo, Icel. nefi a kinsman, Gr. ne`podes, pl., brood, young, Skr. nepāt grandson, descendant. √262. Cf. Niece, Nepotism.]

defs: A grandson or grandchild, or remoter lineal descendant.
quotes: But if any widow have children or nephews [Rev. Ver. grandchildren].
If naturalists say true that nephews are often liker to their grandfathers than to their fathers.

defs: The son of a brother or a sister, or of a brother-in-law or sister-in-law.
